_comment: Explicit regression pins for bugs found and fixed during the 2026-07-04/05 session. Each entry names the exact bug it guards against so a future regression can never silently return. See scripts/README.md for how these are run.

checks.bug: P0 2026-07-05: api/indexnow-key.ts called serverEntry.render() without await, shipping a literal "undefined" body + truncated generic title on every URL (PR #45).
P0 2026-07-05 (same as above) — pinned separately since /news was the URL first reported broken.
P0 2026-07-05 — hardcoded/fallback blog post used to confirm the fix resolves real content, not just a Sanity-backed skeleton.
Hreflang/html-lang mismatch (PR #43): getHreflangLinks()'s !group fallback mislabeled every non-English page as en.
Hreflang/html-lang mismatch (PR #43): hardcoded Swiss hreflang set (de-CH/fr-CH/it-CH/x-default) omitted an en/en-CH self-reference.
Hreflang/html-lang mismatch (PR #43) — same as above, second Swiss listicle.
Hreflang/html-lang mismatch (PR #43): DE/FR blog posts fell through DocumentHead's incomplete opt-out regex into the same !group fallback bug.
Hreflang/html-lang mismatch (PR #43) — same class as above.

Hreflang/html-lang mismatch (PR #43): HREFLANG_LANG_KEYS structurally excluded ru/pt even when a route-group entry existed; server.js's inferHtmlLang() also had no /ru/ prefix handling.
Hreflang/html-lang mismatch (PR #43) — country-page locale variant.

Thin standalone service page (PR #41): page never passed expandedContent to StrategicServicePage. Was ~725-759 words; fix brought it to 6,197.
Thin standalone service page (PR #41) — same class as above. Was ~750 words; fix brought it to 5,249.

Drifted duplicate redirect maps (PR #46): api/indexnow-key.ts's stale copy redirected this to /privacy instead of /terms.
Drifted duplicate redirect maps (PR #46): missing entirely from api/indexnow-key.ts's map, so it didn't redirect at all in production.
